channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bin overflowing, 27th May
item.description:
This bin is still overflowing with litter scattered around. Reports shouldn't be closed until the problem is resolved. It is dishonest massaging the number of outstanding problems.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rowton Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shelf under the sink, 27th May
item.description:
Someone left a shelf under the elevator at lift number 2044 on the 5th floor of Campbell Court, and it has been there for two days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roofbox, 27th May
item.description:
Fly tipped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Lemmon Road, 27th May
item.description:
There's a lot of litter at the end of Lemmon Road (near 33).

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lemmon Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste dumped in alley, 27th May
item.description:
These large bags of garden waste been dumped in the alley between Livingstone Road and Moffat Road. They have been there since at least Monday. The houses in Elevendon Road have back gates into the alley.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elvendon Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken into pavilion, 27th May
item.description:
I have reported this before. It has been fixed using cable ties!!!! The cable ties have been broken. This needs to be sealed up properly. It’s half term and kids are in there again. Broken bottles. Please fix it properly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stanhope Grove, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox found in garden, 27th May
item.description:
Put fox in two plastic bags and placed on top of non recycling bin in driveway of Salcombe - at top of Tudor close br7 5LG
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tudor Close, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty streets, 27th May
item.description:
Very dirty streets outside garages. Please clean the floor and remove the paint.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Regents Row, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near the driveway bit it is blooking our driveway, 27th May
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Padua Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped washing machine by bins on play street, 27th May
item.description:
Dumped washing machine by bins on play street. Kids play there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ashburnham Grove, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty streets and over flowing bins, 27th May
item.description:
Reported issue of excessive litter and fly tipping. Some has been removed but the floors are filthy and have been like this for some time. Please arrange for the floors around bins to be swept and pressure washed and for remaining rubbish to be removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Regents Row, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road sign rotten and fallen apart, 27th May
item.description:
This has been getting worse and worse for years. It has finally rotted through and collapsed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, West Horndon, Brentwood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 122 King Henry’s Road, 27th May
item.description:
Broken glass on the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 133, King Henry's Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bbq and other rubbish dumper in park entrance new road, 27th May
item.description:
Bbq and other rubbish dumper in park entrance new road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Rat, 27th May
item.description:
Dead rat that looks to have been run over, very mangled and decomposing. On the pavement next to the cricket club before the entrance coming from direction of Upper Park Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plaistow Lane, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken children’s toys, 27th May
item.description:
Pile of plastic children’s toys tipped on pavement outside 7 Buchan Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Buchan Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked front two wheels missing, 27th May
item.description:
Car parked missing front two wheels

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beck Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress in park, 27th May
item.description:
Here since yesterday, can someone come and take it away please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Minster Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the corner of parkside avenue and parkside cross there has been a car collision with lots of glass and plastic debris left on the road and payment, 27th May
item.description:
There has been a collision between two cars on the corner of parkside avenue and parkside cross. There is debris on the pavement and in the road. Including glass.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa dumped on pavement, 27th May
item.description:
A sofa has been dumped on the pavement at the side of 1 Hascombe Terrace in Love Walk SE5 8SQ. It is causing an obstruction on the pavement. This is a well known fly tipping hot spot where items are frequently and regularly dumped on the pavement here. It always happens overnight…

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Love Walk, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
